subcodes.first_line: Say: O people! This indeed is the Beloved, Who hath come unto you unveiled and unconcealed. Fear ye God, O people of vision [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا قوم هذا لهو المحبوب قد جائکم من غیر ستر و حجاب اتقوا الله یا اولی
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @idolatry, @chastisement and requital
